improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Try three free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating Gideon's core value and low-commitment entry point. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the free trial and starting price addresses intent and reduces friction.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals. Try three free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces Gideon by name, establishing brand recognition while clearly communicating the core value proposition. The subheading reinforces three tangible benefits (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) that differentiate the product, then closes with a clear, low-friction CTA emphasizing the free trial. The copy is concise, avoids unverifiable claims, and speaks directly to the target audience of business owners and traders.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing Gideon. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30% with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and a full workspace built for trade and business professionals.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the free-to-paid journey. By clearly explaining what happens at the paywall and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and value unlocked, it reduces uncertainty and increases conversion confidence.
